nodes.label: Personal Cabinet Screen
nodes.description: The personal cabinet and profile settings screen for the user.

nodes.label: Profile Header
nodes.description: Header containing user avatar with an edit button, full name ('Julian Forester'), and player tier ('MASTER TIER PLAYER').

nodes.label: Nickname Input Field
nodes.description: Text input for user nickname ('Julian_Foos_92') with a sub-label stating it can only be changed once a month.

nodes.label: Language Selection Toggle
nodes.description: Segmented control to switch between English and Deutsch languages.

nodes.label: Push Notifications Toggle
nodes.description: Switch to enable or disable match alerts and news push notifications.

nodes.label: Confirm Changes Button
nodes.description: Large primary action button at the bottom to save profile changes.

nodes.label: Dark Theme with Green Accents
nodes.description: The screen uses a dark background color palette with prominent green accents for interactive elements and active states.
